title: Grief Release
description: A directed and guided space to support and be supported in feeling, expressing, and releasing what's been beneath the surface. Allow completion, allow witnessing, allow peace. Not simply emotional release, this time will be focused on support for anyone in our community to journey with.

title: Regenerative Relationships: Creating Sustainable Abundance in Polyamory

title: Hyggehiking NYC's Cherry Blossoms
description: On Saturday March 28th, we'll set out to explore as many of NYC's public cherry blossom blooms as we can possibly find, spanning Manhattan, Brooklyn, and Queens.

title: Liquid Love - Workshop
description: Liquid Love is an unfolding devotion to Self, communal care, and trust. In this space, somatic awareness and listening are the primary tools to navigate this terrain.

title: A Celebration of Female Artistry: The Sinfonietta Plays Taylor Swift
description: ​Join Women of Culture and Warrior Women in Business on Saturday, March 28, as we celebrate Women’s History Month with an evening that honors women’s creativity and leadership in music.

title: Reboot Your Story: Rewrite, Rewire & Heal Online Workshop
description: ​What if changing your story could change the way you experience your life? ​As Women’s History Month comes to a close, you are invited to a special complimentary online workshop with author Anne-Cécile Ville on breaking taboos, shifting limiting beliefs, and building confidence from within on March…

title: The Attention Landscape - A Central Park Walk
description: The Attention Landscape: How 19th-Century Designers Shaped Your Perception, Mood, and Movement What if you could step inside the design problem Central Park was created to solve, and try to solve it yourself?

title: The AI Doc: Theater Buyout
description: Opening Weekend Push We're organizing a group screening of The AI Doc (Or How I Became an Apocaloptimist) — a documentary about the existential risks of AI and what we can do about it. Here's the link to the theater and event - https://the-ai-doc-nyc.web.app/ Get your tickets quick!

title: Women's voices, first
description: This Women's History Month, For The Firsts is bringing together founders, executives, and creatives to celebrate the ways women are shaping every field they enter - from content and corporate to business and beyond.

title: Art In Times Of Change: A Women’s History Month Salon & Panel Conversation
description: ​In honor of Women’s History Month, Women of Culture in collaboration with Shakira Polite invite you to an intimate salon and panel discussion exploring the role of art and creativity during moments of transition, reinvention, and uncertainty.

title: Sincere Singles Social - 3.30
description: Connect more deeply — right from hello. Sincere Singles Social is part workshop, part mixer, all connection. You’ll stretch your relational muscles through playful games & real conversations — with singles who are here for something meaningful.
location: Lulla Lounge (2nd floor) @ the Motto Hotel in Chelsea

title: Funemployed ?! & Friends Spring Potluck
description: Let's celebrate Spring... and any bit of warmth we can get. Come hang out with new and old folks who relate on Tuesday, March 31, 5:30 - 8 pm @ Fabrik Tribeca. For this potluck, we encourage you to dress in fun colors and/or prints!

title: Facilitation Lab NYC
description: Bring your real challenges. Leave with new insights, confidence, and skills. Whether you’re a seasoned facilitator or just getting started, Facilitation Lab is your sandbox for solving real problems with facilitation. This isn’t theory—it’s live, collaborative practice.
